text:
OXGN_ADMSN_CD Therapies: Oxygen Therapy (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving oxygen therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
574 OXGN_DSCHRG_CD OXGN_DSCHRG_CD Therapies: Oxygen Therapy (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving oxygen therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
575 OXGN_CNTNUS_ADMSN_CD OXGN_CNTNUS_ADMSN_CD Therapies: Oxygen
